dict.string: AVDash uses the local network to discover and connect to trusted remote monitoring devices on your network.
AVDash needs speech recognition access to transcribe selected audio for captions and kinetic word visualisers.

anchor apple generic and identifier "com.chrisizatt.PodcastPreview.HardwareAgent" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "8CZML8FK2D")
identifier "com.chrisizatt.PodcastPreview.HardwareJobBless" and anchor apple generic and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "8CZML8FK2D"
identifier "com.chrisizatt.PodcastPreview.PowerMetricsJobBless" and anchor apple generic and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "8CZML8FK2D"

anchor apple generic and identifier "com.chrisizatt.PodcastPreview.PowerMetricsService" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "8CZML8FK2D")
